description: Composition White churidar made of cotton, has waistband with drawstrings and tapered legs Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash separately in cold water using mild detergent Dry in shade Do not soak This churidar from fabindia is crafted from soft cotton fabric, designed to provide absolute comfort and perfect fit. Team it with long kurtas and sandals and you're all set to seize the day with a fab traditional look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
